title: Light Garlic Korean Chicken Stir-fry
description: A light and flavorful Korean-inspired dish using chicken bouillon powder as a base for this quick weeknight meal that's also keto-friendly.

ingredients.name: soy sauce
ingredients.notes: low sodium or gluten-free soy sauce for a lighter version

ingredients.name: ground beef or pork
ingredients.amount: 3 oz (or substitute with tofu or shrimp)

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat and add a tablespoon of sesame oil.
Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add chicken pieces and stir-fry until they turn white and are almost cooked through, about 5 minutes.
Stir in soy sauce, rice wine vinegar (if using), and Korean chili flakes. Cook for an additional minute to let the flavors meld together.
For added protein, add ground beef or pork, tofu, or shrimp if desired and continue cooking until fully heated.
Toss with chopped green onions and sesame seeds just before serving.
